anchor_text: Earn Microsoft Rewards just for searching
selectors.label: Rewards
selectors.reason: Open the Bing Rewards surface from the main shell.

selectors.label: real estate market trends, earn 5 points
selectors.reason: Representative first visible search reward row. Equivalent search rows can be tapped in sequence until Search to earn reaches 50/50.

selectors.reason: Representative tap region for the top news article after one upward swipe from the Bing home shell. Use this to drive Read to earn with unique article titles.
